features: Added CFDesk Home as the default local command center
Added resource map tiles for R2, D1, KV, Workers, Queues, and token checks
Added workspace readiness scoring for account, resource loading, privacy, and update state
Added a global command center with page navigation, docs links, copyable Wrangler commands, and account actions
Added keyboard shortcuts for command search, sidebar toggle, and numbered navigation
Added copyable Cloudflare API token permission and environment variable snippets
Added cache freshness indicators for D1, R2, and KV data
Added Workers health summaries and recently updated Worker shortcuts
Added local Wrangler runbook cards for common local, remote preview, deploy, and tail flows
Added account-aware dashboard, API token, and Local Explorer launch points
Persisted active navigation, recent navigation, and sidebar collapsed state
Code-split major views so the initial app shell loads with smaller chunks
featuresZh: 新增默认 CFDesk Home，作为本机命令中心

新增全局命令中心，支持页面导航、文档入口、Wrangler 命令复制和账号操作
新增命令搜索、侧边栏切换和数字导航快捷键
新增可复制的 Cloudflare API Token 权限和环境变量片段
新增 D1、R2、KV 数据缓存新鲜度提示
新增 Workers 健康摘要和最近更新 Worker 快捷入口
新增本机 Wrangler runbook 卡片，覆盖本地开发、远程预览、部署和日志跟踪流程
新增账号 Dashboard、API Tokens 和 Local Explorer 的快捷入口
持久化当前导航、最近导航和侧边栏收起状态
对主要页面做按需加载，降低初始应用 shell 的体积
fixes: Added focused tests for CFDesk Home cache freshness, command filtering, release readiness, token copy, and account URL helpers
Replaced stale public wording in R2 upload requirements with cleaner product language
Kept the existing remote overview and resource pages intact while moving the default landing surface to CFDesk Home
